description_long: This object is a compact laptop with a minimalist design, featuring a light blue keyboard and screen bezel set within a white chassis. The laptop is accompanied by a matching white and blue wired mouse, with the cable visibly connected to the side of the device. The keyboard appears to be a standard layout, and the screen is open, displaying a blank, light-colored display. The laptop's body is slim, with rounded edges and a smooth, matte finish. No visible branding or stickers are present on the exterior surfaces. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for use in public urban spaces such as libraries, cafes, or co-working areas.
description: A sleek, white laptop with a light blue keyboard and screen bezel, paired with a matching wired mouse. The design is minimalist and modern, with no visible branding or stickers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the open laptop with a visible blue keyboard and screen, and the wired mouse connected on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full keyboard, blank screen, and the mouse positioned to the right with its cable extending backward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the laptop's slim profile, open screen, and the mouse cable looping outward.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the closed back of the laptop and the mouse to the left, with the cable trailing away.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is visible and appears to be a standard QWERTY layout without a numeric keypad or function row.
